title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
